label: memory • past-conversation episode grounds a 'what did we discuss' ask
query: What did we decide about the greenhouse project last time we talked?
notes: Episode-layer recall: the heuristic gate picks episode summaries for retrospective phrasing ('last time we talked'), so this row proves the episodic layer — not just pinned facts — flows through injection and lands in the answer. Codeword: the cedar-frame decision. Off-CI (needs a model).

episodes.summary: Discussed the greenhouse project: decided on a cedar frame with twin-wall polycarbonate panels, budget capped at $900.
